Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
In this training, Dean is going to show you the anatomy and framework of the perfect order page. Now that you know what a landing page is, and you
know how to drive traffic to the landing page, the next step is to understand the order page and the application page. This video will take you a little
deeper on the order page and how it works the best.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Jot down a few potential headlines for your future order page.
Think through the benefits, dates and bullets associated with your event to add to your order page.
Make sure you mention bonuses and urgency at the bottom of the order page. Write down some bonuses you could give to your new
members.
Make sure you understand the importance of the confirmation page and what messaging and “next steps” you can have on yours.
Layout an appropriate action plan for emails/texts/phone calls that lead up to the first day of your small group, workshop or mastermind
that keeps your attendees excited for what’s next.
